category_sources: source_facts.description says msieve is a C library for factoring large integers; official SourceForge project categorizes it under Mathematics and Cryptography and describes SIQS/GNFS factorization algorithms.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is msieve; official SourceForge project heading uses Msieve.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge project page is the best supplied official documentation surface and describes purpose, categories, license, and activity; no dedicated docs page was found.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge project has a Code tab that opens the project source tree and shows HTTPS/SVN access.
tags_sources: Official SourceForge page says Msieve implements algorithms to factor large integers and contains SIQS and GNFS; it lists Mathematics and Cryptography categories.
